parameters.query:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT status, processing_time_ms, COALESCE(supplier_code, 'unknown') AS tenant_id, error_details
  FROM invoice_log
  WHERE created_at >= '{{$json.from_ts}}'::timestamp
    AND created_at <= '{{$json.to_ts}}'::timestamp
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    COUNT(*) AS invoices_total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'completed') AS completed,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('failed','error','token_error','rejected')) AS failed,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'needs_mapping') AS needs_mapping,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('needs_review','draft')) AS needs_review,
    ROUND(AVG(NULLIF(processing_time_ms, 0)))::int AS avg_processing_ms
  FROM base
  GROUP BY tenant_id
), upsert AS (
  INSERT INTO ops_metrics_daily (metric_date, tenant_id, invoices_total, completed, failed, needs_mapping, needs_review, avg_processing_ms, created_at, updated_at)
  SELECT '{{$json.metric_date}}'::date, tenant_id, invoices_total, completed, failed, needs_mapping, needs_review, avg_processing_ms, NOW(), NOW()
  FROM agg
  ON CONFLICT (metric_date, tenant_id) DO UPDATE
  SET invoices_total = EXCLUDED.invoices_total,
      completed = EXCLUDED.completed,
      failed = EXCLUDED.failed,
      needs_mapping = EXCLUDED.needs_mapping,
      needs_review = EXCLUDED.needs_review,
      avg_processing_ms = EXCLUDED.avg_processing_ms,
      updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING *
)
SELECT * FROM upsert;

SELECT COALESCE(error_details, 'unknown_error') AS error_type, COUNT(*) AS total
FROM invoice_log
WHERE created_at >= '{{$('Build Yesterday Range').item.json.from_ts}}'::timestamp
  AND created_at <= '{{$('Build Yesterday Range').item.json.to_ts}}'::timestamp
  AND status IN ('failed','error','token_error','rejected')
GROUP BY COALESCE(error_details, 'unknown_error')
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 5;

INSERT INTO ops_events (ts, level, workflow, event_type, message, context) VALUES (NOW(), 'info', 'daily_ops_summary', 'summary_sent', 'Daily summary dispatched to configured webhook', jsonb_build_object('metric_date', '{{$('Build Summary Message').item.json.metric_date}}', 'webhook_configured', {{ $env.OPS_ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL ? 'true' : 'false' }}));
